description.fi: Ydinontologia Suomen sosiaaliturvan keskeisille käsitteille: hakijat, etuudet, etuuskriteerit, palvelut, organisaatiot ja säädökset.
description.en: Core Ontology for Finnish social security concepts: applicants, benefits, eligibility criteria, services, organisations and legislation.

comments.fi: Ydinversio: sisältää vain sosiaaliturvan keskeiset käsitteet (etuudet, kelpoisuus, elämäntilanteet, säädökset, ...).

changeNote.value: Ydinontologia sisältää ainoastaan ydinluokat ja ominaisuudet.
Core ontology contains only core classess and properties.

abstract.value:
The Social Security Ontology describes the conceptual structure of the Finnish social security system.
		It is intended to support knowledge graph implementations for policy analysis, eligibility reasoning and data integration. The ontology models relationships between:
        benefits, eligibility criteria, services (benefit related), life situations, organisations, legislation, and concepts.

Sosiaaliturvan ontologia kuvaa etuudet, etuuskriteerit, palvelut,  
        organisaatiot, lainsäädännön sekä sosiaaliturvan käsitteet.

scopeNote.value: Sosiaaliturvan tietämysgraafi (KELAO) ei sisällä hakijakohtaisia tietoja — henkilötiedot käsitellään Kelan operatiivisissa järjestelmissä.
The Social Security knowledge graph (KELAO) does not contain applicant-level data — personal data is processed in Kela's operational systems.

definition.value: An ordered collection of concepts, where both the grouping and the ordering are meaningful.
An ordered collection of concepts, where both the grouping and the ordering are meaningful.

scopeNote.value: Ordered collections can be used where you would like a set of concepts to be displayed in a specific order, and optionally under a 'node label'.
Ordered collections can be used where you would like a set of concepts to be displayed in a specific order, and optionally under a 'node label'.

definition.value: Sovelluksen käyttäjä, agentti tms.
A human actor or agent, user or application user
A meaningful collection of concepts.
A meaningful collection of concepts.

scopeNote.value: Labelled collections can be used where you would like a set of concepts to be displayed under a 'node label' in the hierarchy.
Labelled collections can be used where you would like a set of concepts to be displayed under a 'node label' in the hierarchy.

definition.value: Text containing provisions issued by public authorities that are to be observed generally.
Tekstikokonaisuus, joka sisältää julkisen vallan antamia yleisesti noudatettaviksi tarkoitettuja säännöksiä.

example.value: Säädöksiä ovat esimerkiksi lait ja asetukset sekä viranomaisten antamat oikeussäännöt.
Examples of statutes are acts and decrees as well as legal provisions issued by authorities.

comment.fi: Lainsäädäntöaineistoon kuuluva teos. Tämä koskee lainvoimaisesti säädettyjä lakeja (riippumatta siitä, ovatko ne vielä voimassa). Oikeudellinen resurssi voi edustaa säädöstä tai mitä tahansa säädöksen osaa, kuten artiklaa. Oikeudelliset resurssit voidaan linkittää toisiinsa mallissa määriteltyjen ominaisuuksien avulla.
comment.en: A work in a legislative corpus. This applies to acts that have been legally enacted (whether or not they are still in force). A legal resource can represent a legal act or any component of a legal act, like an article. Legal resources can be linked together using properties defined in the model.

definition.value: Hakemukseen liitettävä lisämateriaali, joka täydentää tai todentaa hakemuksen tietoja.
Supplementary material attached to an application that completes or substantiates the application's information.

scopeNote.value: Liitettä tarvitaan joskus hakemuksen liitteeksi; pakollisuus on hakemus- tai etuuskohtaista (kuvataan SHACLissa, ei luokkatasolla).

comment.fi: Hakemuksen liite, esim. tosite, todistus tai lomake.
comment.en: An application attachment, e.g. a receipt, certificate or form.

definition.value: Hakijan etuutta tai palvelua koskeva hakemus. Hakemuksen vireilletulo käynnistää asian käsittelyn.
An applicant's request for a benefit or service. Filing initiates processing of the case.

scopeNote.value: Conceptual class only. The KELAO knowledge graph does not contain applicant-level instances — personal data is processed in Kela's operational systems.
Käsitteellinen luokka. KELAO-tietämysgraafi ei sisällä hakijakohtaisia instansseja — henkilötiedot käsitellään Kelan operatiivisissa järjestelmissä.

definition.value: A natural or legal person who applies for a benefit or service, or to whom the right to apply has been transferred.
Henkilö tai oikeushenkilö, joka hakee etuutta tai palvelua, tai jolle hakuoikeus on siirtynyt.

scopeNote.value: Hakija on prosessirooli. kelao:User on sovelluksen käyttäjä; sama henkilö voi olla molempia.

definition.value: A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.
A set of concepts, optionally including statements about semantic relationships between those concepts.

scopeNote.value: A concept scheme may be defined to include concepts from different sources.
A concept scheme may be defined to include concepts from different sources.

example.value: Thesauri, classification schemes, subject heading lists, taxonomies, 'folksonomies', and other types of controlled vocabulary are all examples of concept schemes. Concept schemes are also embedded in glossaries and terminologies.

Thesauri, classification schemes, subject heading lists, taxonomies, 'folksonomies', and other types of controlled vocabulary are all examples of concept schemes. Concept schemes are also embedded in glossaries and terminologies.

definition.value: Lain tai asetuksen osa riippumatta siitä, onko kyseessä luku, pykälä vai momentti

comment.fi:
Lain tai asetuksen osa (luku, pykälä, momentti, kohta yms.).
          Tämä luokka on tarkoitettu erottamaan kokonaiset lait niiden osista. EU-asetuksissa ym. on myös muu jaottelu kuin Suomessa.

definition.value: An authority's resolution on an application; grants or rejects the requested benefit in full or in part.
Viranomaisen ratkaisu hakemukseen; myöntää tai hylkää haetun etuuden kokonaan tai osittain.
An idea or notion; a unit of thought.
An idea or notion; a unit of thought.
Life situations refer to phases of change characterized by temporary nature, the need for special services and information, and services targeted to them.
Elämäntilanteilla tarkoitetaan sellaisia muutosvaiheita, joita kuvaa väliaikaisuus, erityisten palvelujen ja tiedon tarve sekä niihin kohdennetut palvelut.

comment.fi:
Elämäntilanteilla tarkoitetaan sellaisia muutosvaiheita, joita kuvaa väliaikaisuus, erityisten palvelujen ja tiedon tarve sekä niihin kohdennetut palvelut.
        Elämäntilanneluokitus on toteutettu muualla skos-luokituksena. Luokituksen luokat ovat käsitteitä. Luokitus on luonnos. Pohjana on käytetty
        DVV:n elämäntapahtumaluokitusta, joka perustuu EU-luokitukseen.
comment.en: Life situations refer to phases of change characterized by temporary nature, the need for special services and information, and services targeted to them.

comment.fi: Sosiaaliturvan etuus tai tuki. Yleinen luokka — käytä alaluokkia instansseissa.
comment.en: A social security benefit or allowance. General class — use subclasses for instances.

comment.fi: Säädöksen tyyppi määritellään skos-luokituksessa StatuteTypeSkos. Luokitus on luonnos. Sisältää Kelaan soveltuvan sekä suomalaisen että eu-lainsäädännön

definition.value: An applicant's request for rectification of or appeal against a decision.
Hakijan päätökseen kohdistama oikaisuvaatimus tai valitus.

scopeNote.value:
KELAO-kontekstissa vastaa PTV:n Organization-käsitettä ja 
         schema.org/Organization-käsitettä. Käytetään kuvaamaan kaikkia 
         toimijaorganisaatioita sektorirajat ylittäen (julkinen, yksityinen, 
         kolmas sektori). EU Core Public Organisation on tämän erikoistapaus.

comment.fi: Toimija, joka on henkilöiden muodostama yhteenliittymä ja jolla on yhteinen tavoite ja tarkoituksenmukainen rakenne
comment.en: An actor that is an association of individuals with a common goal and a purposeful structure

definition.value: Toiminto, jolla palveluntoteuttaja vastaa asiakkaan tarpeeseen.
An activity by which a service provider responds to a customer's need.

scopeNote.value: Ydinmallissa palvelu liitetään etuuteen esim. hakemus- tai neuvontapalveluna (kelao:relatedService). Palvelukanavat ja PTV-metatieto ovat ydinmallin ulkopuolella.

comment.fi: Sosiaaliturvaan liittyvä palvelu, esim. hakemus- tai neuvontapalvelu.
comment.en: A social-security-related service, e.g. an application or advisory service.

definition.value: Etuuden itsenäinen, erikseen käsiteltävä osa, joka voidaan myöntää vain, jos myös etuus, jonka osa on kyseessä, on myönnetty.
An independent and separately processed part of a benefit that can be granted only if the benefit in which the part belongs is also granted.

example.value: Esimerkiksi opintotuessa etuuden osia ovat opintoraha, asumislisä ja opintolainan valtiontakaus; lesken- ja lapseneläkkeessä osia ovat perus- ja täydennysmäärät.
For example, the study grant, housing supplement and government guarantee for student loan are parts of the financial aid for students.

definition.value: Links a concept to a concept related by meaning.
Links a concept to a concept related by meaning.

scopeNote.value: This property should not be used directly, but as a super-property for all properties denoting a relationship of meaning between concepts.
This property should not be used directly, but as a super-property for all properties denoting a relationship of meaning between concepts.
xsd:duration ei kuulu OWL 2 DL -datatyyppikarttaan, mutta on tuettu kaikissa KELAO-kohdejärjestelmissä (GraphDB, Fuseki).

comment.en: Processing time in business days (Monday-Friday, excluding holidays). Decimal values allowed (e.g., 5.1 = 5 days and 0.8 hours).

definition.value: Relates a concept to a concept that is more specific in meaning.
Relates a concept to a concept that is more specific in meaning.

scopeNote.value: By convention, skos:broader is only used to assert an immediate (i.e. direct) hierarchical link between two conceptual resources.
By convention, skos:broader is only used to assert an immediate (i.e. direct) hierarchical link between two conceptual resources.

comment.en: Narrower concepts are typically rendered as children in a concept hierarchy (tree).

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:LegalResource-instansseilla.

comment.fi: Säädöksen hyväksymis- tai allekirjoituspäivä muodossa vvvv-kk-pp.
comment.en: Date of adoption or signature of the legal resource (yyyy-mm-dd).

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:LegalResource-instansseilla. Kuvaa hetken, jolloin säädöksen kyseinen versio on voimassa.

comment.fi: Päivämäärä, jolloin säädöksen tämä versio on voimassa.
comment.en: The point-in-time at which the provided description of the legislation is valid.
An application submitted by the applicant.

definition.value: Relates a concept to a concept with which there is an associative semantic relationship.
Relates a concept to a concept with which there is an associative semantic relationship.

comment.sv: Förmånen gäller till och med datumet

scopeNote.value:
Käytetään kelao:LegalResource-instansseilla. 
         Arvo on säädöksen kansallinen numero/vuosi-tunniste, 
         esim. '404/1948' tai '1301/2007'.

comment.en: National identifier of the legal resource in the form number/year.

definition.value: Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.
Relates a resource (for example a concept) to a concept scheme in which it is included.

scopeNote.value: A concept may be a member of more than one concept scheme.
A concept may be a member of more than one concept scheme.

definition.value: Relates, by convention, a concept scheme to a concept which is topmost in the broader/narrower concept hierarchies for that scheme, providing an entry point to these hierarchies.
Relates, by convention, a concept scheme to a concept which is topmost in the broader/narrower concept hierarchies for that scheme, providing an entry point to these hierarchies.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:LegalResource-instansseilla. Kuvaa säädöksen vakiintuneen lyhenteen, esim. 'KEL' tai 'SHL'.

comment.fi: Säädöksen vakiintunut lyhenne tai vaihtoehtoinen nimi.
comment.en: An established acronym or alternative name for the legal resource.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Decision-instansseilla (xsd:date).

comment.fi: Yksilöllinen tunniste uuid. Käytössä etuuksilla, palvelukanavilla, palveluilla ja liitteissä.
comment.en: Universally unique identifier used for benefits and attachments.

definition.value: skos:exactMatch is used to link two concepts, indicating a high degree of confidence that the concepts can be used interchangeably across a wide range of information retrieval applications. skos:exactMatch is a transitive property, and is a sub-property of skos:closeMatch.

skos:exactMatch is used to link two concepts, indicating a high degree of confidence that the concepts can be used interchangeably across a wide range of information retrieval applications. skos:exactMatch is a transitive property, and is a sub-property of skos:closeMatch.

comment.en: skos:exactMatch is disjoint with each of the properties skos:broadMatch and skos:relatedMatch.

definition.value: Mihin indeksiin etuus on sidottu (esim. Kansaneläkeindeksi)

comment.fi: Mihin indeksiin etuus on sidottu (esim. Kansaneläkeindeksi)

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Attachment-instansseilla (xsd:anyURI).

comment.en: URI link to where the attachment can be found.

definition.value: skos:broadMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.
skos:broadMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.

comment.fi: Etuuteen liittyvä palvelu, esim. hakemus- tai neuvontapalvelu.
comment.en: A service related to the benefit, e.g. an application or advisory service.

definition.value: A notation, also known as classification code, is a string of characters such as "T58.5" or "303.4833" used to uniquely identify a concept within the scope of a given concept scheme.
A notation, also known as classification code, is a string of characters such as "T58.5" or "303.4833" used to uniquely identify a concept within the scope of a given concept scheme.

scopeNote.value: By convention, skos:notation is used with a typed literal in the object position of the triple.
By convention, skos:notation is used with a typed literal in the object position of the triple.

definition.value: skos:relatedMatch is used to state an associative mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.
skos:relatedMatch is used to state an associative mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.
Relates a concept to the concept scheme that it is a top level concept of.
Relates a concept to the concept scheme that it is a top level concept of.

comment.en: An attachment belonging to the application.

definition.value: skos:narrowMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.
skos:narrowMatch is used to state a hierarchical mapping link between two conceptual resources in different concept schemes.

comment.en: The decision issued on the application.

definition.value: Relates an ordered collection to the RDF list containing its members.
Relates an ordered collection to the RDF list containing its members.

comment.en:
For any resource, every item in the list given as the value of the
      skos:memberList property is also a value of the skos:member property.

comment.fi: Etuuden voimassaolon alku, milloin Kela tai muu organisaatio alkoi sitä maksamaan.

definition.value: Relates a collection to one of its members.
Relates a collection to one of its members.

comment.sv: För att fastställa rätten till förmåner krävs en behovsprövning.
comment.fi: Etuuden oikeuden päättely edellyttää tarveharkintaa, tarveharkinnan selitys.
comment.en: Determining entitlement to benefits requires a means test.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Application-instansseilla. Esim. 'vireillä', 'käsittelyssä', 'ratkaistu'.

definition.value: skos:closeMatch is used to link two concepts that are sufficiently similar that they can be used interchangeably in some information retrieval applications. In order to avoid the possibility of "compound errors" when combining mappings across more than two concept schemes, skos:closeMatch is not declared to be a transitive property.

skos:closeMatch is used to link two concepts that are sufficiently similar that they can be used interchangeably in some information retrieval applications. In order to avoid the possibility of "compound errors" when combining mappings across more than two concept schemes, skos:closeMatch is not declared to be a transitive property.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Benefit-instansseilla etuuden kotisivuun viittaamisessa.

comment.fi: Etuus tai palvelu perustuu tähän lakiin tai säädökseen.

scopeNote.value: xsd:duration ei kuulu OWL 2 DL -datatyyppikarttaan, mutta on tuettu kaikissa KELAO-kohdejärjestelmissä (GraphDB, Fuseki).

comment.fi: Etuuden keskimääräinen käsittelyaika päivinä hakemuksen saapumisesta. Joissain tapauksissa kyse on arkipäivistä esim. 5,1 arkipäivää.
comment.en: Typical time required to process the benefit application.
The applicant applies for this benefit.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Decision-instansseilla. Esim. 'myönnetty', 'hylätty', 'osittain myönnetty'.

Käytetään kelao:LegalResource-instansseilla. 
         Arvo on xsd:anyURI-muotoinen ELI-URI Finlex-palveluun, 
         esim. 'https://www.finlex.fi/fi/laki/ajantasa/2007/20071301'.

comment.en: Official ELI URI identifying the legal resource on Finlex.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Appeal-instansseilla (xsd:date).

definition.value: skos:broaderTransitive is a transitive superproperty of skos:broader.
skos:broaderTransitive is a transitive superproperty of skos:broader.

scopeNote.value: By convention, skos:broaderTransitive is not used to make assertions. Rather, the properties can be used to draw inferences about the transitive closure of the hierarchical relation, which is useful e.g. when implementing a simple query expansion algorithm in a search application.

By convention, skos:broaderTransitive is not used to make assertions. Rather, the properties can be used to draw inferences about the transitive closure of the hierarchical relation, which is useful e.g. when implementing a simple query expansion algorithm in a search application.

comment.en: Internal abbreviation used by Kela for the benefit.

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Application-instansseilla (xsd:date). Päivä jolloin hakemus tuli vireille.

comment.en: Date the application was filed and became pending.

definition.value: Relates a concept to a concept that is more general in meaning.
Relates a concept to a concept that is more general in meaning.

scopeNote.value: By convention, skos:broader is only used to assert an immediate (i.e. direct) hierarchical link between two conceptual resources.
By convention, skos:broader is only used to assert an immediate (i.e. direct) hierarchical link between two conceptual resources.

comment.en: Broader concepts are typically rendered as parents in a concept hierarchy (tree).

comment.fi: Lain tai muun säädöksen osa esim. pykälä.

comment.en: The decision the appeal is directed against.

definition.value: Relates two concepts coming, by convention, from different schemes, and that have comparable meanings
Relates two concepts coming, by convention, from different schemes, and that have comparable meanings

comment.en: These concept mapping relations mirror semantic relations, and the data model defined below is similar (with the exception of skos:exactMatch) to the data model defined for semantic relations. A distinct vocabulary is provided for concept mapping relations, to provide a convenient way to differentiate links within a concept scheme from links between concept schemes. However, this pattern of usage is not a formal requirement of the SKOS data model, and relies on informal definitions of best practice.

definition.value: Miten etuuden määrä lasketaan

scopeNote.value: Käytetään kelao:Attachment-instansseilla (xsd:boolean).

comment.fi: Onko liite haettavissa tai ilmoitettavissa OmaKelassa.
comment.en: Whether the attachment can be requested or reported in OmaKela.

comment.fi: Käyttäjä tai hakija on todettu oikeutetuksi etuuteen validoinnin tai päätöksen perusteella.
comment.en: User or applicant has been determined eligible for the benefit.

definition.value: skos:narrowerTransitive is a transitive superproperty of skos:narrower.
skos:narrowerTransitive is a transitive superproperty of skos:narrower.

scopeNote.value: By convention, skos:narrowerTransitive is not used to make assertions. Rather, the properties can be used to draw inferences about the transitive closure of the hierarchical relation, which is useful e.g. when implementing a simple query expansion algorithm in a search application.
